title: Velvety Bitter Summer Savory Leaves Stir-fry
description: A post-workout Japanese dish featuring dehydrated summer savory leaves, seasoned with bitter flavors to enhance recovery and vitality.

ingredients.name: Water or Shoyu (Shaoxing Wine)
ingredients.notes: Deglazing liquid, can substitute with shoyu for a richer flavor

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add chopped garlic to the pan and stir for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not burnt.
Deglaze the pan with water or shoyu, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan. Let it simmer for a minute.
Toss in the dried summer savory leaves and Katsuobushi. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes until all ingredients are fully incorporated and evenly cooked.
Serve immediately as a nutritious post-workout snack.
